title: Burg Wachter Style Wall Mounted Steel Lockable Weather Resistant Post Box 31x21.5x7cm - White
features: Weather resistant - Made from corrosion resistant powder coated galvanised steel gives great defence against the elements
Ideal for flats & apartments – the post boxes are bankable with each post box has a name plate window to easily identify the flat or apartment number
Stylish & compact - using a sleek modern design and compact dimensions of 310x210x70mm
Fittings Included - Supplied with the correct wall plugs and screws to secure the post box to a wall
description: From the manufacturer Who We Are Burg Wächter offers a range of physical security hardware with an emphasis on quality and great value. Burg-Wächter, Europe’s largest safe and post box manufacturer and a trusted brand throughout the world. Burg-Wächter has a proud heritage of over 120 years and are recognised for quality standards across our extensive range of locks, padlocks, safes, post boxes and access control solutions. Over 120 years security experience 10,000 individual product lines Europe’s largest safe and post box manufacturer Burg Wächter Style Wall Mounted Galvanised Steel Lockable Weatherproof Post Box White - 31x21.5x7cm The Burg Wächter Style design Post Box is manufactured from tough galvanised steel with a secure lock. It is ideal for smaller volumes of post and is perfect for grouping together and creating banks of post boxes. An outward opening letter flap provides all-round weather protection to keep mail dry, whilst the specially designed narrow post slot provides extra security against post being removed. Mail is retrieved by unlocking the drop front style door. Corrosion resistant powder coated galvanised steel Weather resistant, with no springs to corrode Front opening letter flap for improved weather protection Intergrated nameplate Suitable for grouping together into banks of postboxes The Burg Wächter Style is a ideal for installing in banks of post boxes. each box has a name plate window & its compact dimensions and modern design suit both internal and external use.
